children.label: Card Subtitle
children.default: Short insight description for hover state.

default.card_title: Unlock Timeshare Points Value with Agentic AI
default.card_subtitle: AI-powered autonomous agents transform timeshare exchanges into dynamic, frictionless marketplaces.

default.card_title: Proactive Customer Churn Detection via Agentforce
default.card_subtitle: Salesforce-native AI agent detects churn risk and delivers explainable mitigation strategies.

default.card_title: Dynamic Agent Factory For Evolving Requirements
default.card_subtitle: Dynamic Agent Factory creates specialized AI agents on demand from configuration, removing hardcoded systems and enabling rapid adaptation as requirements evolve.

default.card_title: MCP: One Protocol for All AI Connections
default.card_subtitle: MCP is a standard client–server architecture that lets AI applications connect to external systems to perform actions, access data, and reuse prompt templates.

default.card_title: True Forecast: AI-Driven Scoring for Sales Pipeline
default.card_subtitle: Salesforce add-on combining deterministic math and AI to eliminate forecast bias.
